close_reason: Intentional: into_inner() is the standard adapter/newtype pattern. Arc<dyn SigningBackend> is already public API surface in secretx-core.
description: into_inner() on all three Signer types returns Arc<dyn SigningBackend>. This exposes the internal representation (Arc-wrapped trait object) as a stable public API. Callers who call into_inner() to recover a backend for re-use elsewhere now depend on the Arc wrapping being permanent. If the implementation ever needs to hold the backend differently (e.g. wrapping it in another layer), the return type of into_inner() cannot change without a breaking release. Consider whether into_inner() is needed at all, or whether it should return an opaque handle type.
title: into_inner() exposes Arc<dyn SigningBackend> — leaks abstraction
